description_long: This is a low-polygon stylized representation of an adult male pedestrian in a dynamic, forward-leaning pose, as if running or lunging. The figure features exaggeratedly elongated arms, with one arm extended far forward and the other backward, creating a sense of motion and energy. The head is proportionally small and angular, with minimal facial detail, and the body is dressed in a fitted, modern outfit with a jacket and pants. The legs are bent at the knees, further emphasizing the action-oriented posture. The overall form is geometric and faceted, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, giving it a contemporary, abstract appearance.
description: A stylized, low-poly adult male in a dynamic running or lunging pose with exaggeratedly long arms and angular features, dressed in modern fitted clothing.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the forward-leaning pose, extended right arm, and bent legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the dynamic forward motion of the figure.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the backward extension of the left arm and the angular geometry of the back and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left profile, with the head, torso, and both arms clearly visible in their exaggerated positions.
